creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
For additional clarity:

* <https://freebsd.kde.org/people.html>                 (kde.org)
                          refers to mailto:kde@freebsd.org
                          and presents the     freebsd.org usernames  
                          for five maintainers

* <https://lists.freebsd.org/>                    (mlmmj-webview) 
                          does _not_ include kde

* <https://mail.kde.org/mailman/listinfo/kde-freebsd>   (mailman)  
                          is the information page for 
      kde-freebsd@kde.org and ultimately, 
        <https://mail.kde.org/pipermail/kde-freebsd/> (pipermail) 
                          is where we find email that was addressed to 
      kde-freebsd@kde.org and 
          kde@freebsd.org and 
  freebsd-kde@freebsd.org
